title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; interact with Ollama’s REST API natively.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now renamed “Open WebUI”); model management, RAG, multi-user, plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, streaming, embeddings, list/pull/delete models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with chat history, markdown rendering, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for code completion.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + ChromaDB + LangChain to chat with your documents offline.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling support.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that sends selected code or prompts to Ollama and inserts responses directly in buffer.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express.js starter that exposes Ollama as an OpenAI-compatible HTTP endpoint for drop-in replacement.

title: ollama-embeddings
summary: Micro-service example showing how to generate embeddings with Ollama and store them in Postgres/pgvector.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger CI module to spin up Ollama containers and run LLM-based tests in your pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API with serde types.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an “Ask Ollama” command to summarize or rewrite notes using a local model.
